config.script:
'getCurrentRKS #include "50120"
function prepare_zois(dDateStart,dDateEnd,byref pParChoiceStatus,byref pParamSymbol,byref pParChoiceColums,byval idKwalifikator) set prepare_zois = prepare_zois_bilans_filter(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,pParamSymbol,pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator,false) end function
'------------------------------------------------ 'funkcja kompatybilna z istniejacymi wywolaniami '------------------------------------------------ function prepare_zois_bilans_filter(dDateStart,dDateEnd,byref pParChoiceStatus,byref pParamSymbol,byref pParChoiceColums,byval idKwalifikator , bilans_filter) dim strFiltrSymbolu : strFiltrSymbolu = ""
if not pParamSymbol is nothing then strFiltrSymbolu = cstr(pParamSymbol.get_where_part(trans_)) end if
set prepare_zois_bilans_filter = prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex(dDateStart, dDateEnd, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, _ pParChoiceColums, idKwalifikator, bilans_filter) end function
function prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex(byval dDateStart, byval dDateEnd, byref pParChoiceStatus, byval strFiltrSymbolu, _ byref pParChoiceColums,byval idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe) set prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex = prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex_2(dDateStart, dDateEnd, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, "") end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 'aktualna wersja ' ' uwaga: tabela n5konto ma alias t_konto (ważne przy budowaniu filtra na symbol '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ function prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex_2(byval dDateStart, byval dDateEnd, byref pParChoiceStatus, byval strFiltrSymbolu, _ byref pParChoiceColums,byval idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, byval strSkrot)
'------------------- dim pKIM : set pKIM = doc_.system.activex("navofk.CKontoInfoMan")
'------------------- 'PASS 0: inicjalizacja pKIM.configure true,true,true,true
'------------------- 'PASS 1: wypełnij słownik kontami pKIM.init_konto 0 '<root>
dim pCursKonta : set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5konto") do while not pCursKonta.EOF pKIM.init_konto pCursKonta(0) pCursKonta.movenext loop set pCursKonta = nothing
'------------------- 'PASS 2 - utwórz hierarchię set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj, pkontonadrz from n5konto") do while not pCursKonta.EOF pKIM.set_parent pCursKonta(0), pCursKonta(1) pCursKonta.movenext loop set pCursKonta = nothing
'------------------- 'PASS 3 - Query 1: wylicz BO dim strWhere : strWhere = "eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_BO and eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and dDataKsieg >= " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp) +_ " and dDataKsieg <= " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(getCurrentRKS().dDataZakon) if strSkrot = "" then strWhere = build_zois_where(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe) else strWhere = build_zois_where_ex(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, strSkrot) end if
#ifdef _IOW dim pCursDekrety : set pCursDekrety = trans_.createadors( _ "select t_ds.pKonto,case when sum(t_ds.curWn)-sum(t_ds.curMa) > 0 then sum(t_ds.curWn)-sum(t_ds.curMa) else 0 end," +_ "case when sum(t_ds.curMa)- sum(t_ds.curWn) > 0 then sum(t_ds.curMa)- sum(t_ds.curWn) else 0 end from n5dekret_sums as t_ds " +_ "join n5konto as t_konto on t_ds.pKonto=t_konto.idobj where " + strWhere + " group by t_ds.pKonto") #else dim pCursDekrety : set pCursDekrety = trans_.createadors( _ "select t_ds.pKonto, sum(t_ds.curWn), sum(t_ds.curMa) from n5dekret_sums as t_ds join n5konto as t_konto " +_ "on t_ds.pKonto=t_konto.idobj where " + strWhere + " group by t_ds.pKonto") #endif
do while not pCursDekrety.EOF pKIM.put_BO pCursDekrety(0),pCursDekrety(1),pCursDekrety(2) pCursDekrety.movenext loop set pCursDekrety = nothing
'------------------- 'PASS 4 - Query 2: wylicz 'przed okresem'
strWhere = "eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY and eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and dDataKsieg >= " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp) +_ " and dDataKsieg <" + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDateStart) if strSkrot = "" then strWhere = build_zois_where(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe) else strWhere = build_zois_where_ex(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, strSkrot) end if
set pCursDekrety = trans_.createadors( _ "select pKonto,sum(curWn),sum(curMa) from n5dekret_sums as t_ds join n5konto as t_konto " +_ "on t_ds.pKonto=t_konto.idobj where " + strWhere + " group by t_ds.pKonto") do while not pCursDekrety.EOF pKIM.put_ObrP pCursDekrety(0),pCursDekrety(1),pCursDekrety(2) pCursDekrety.movenext loop set pCursDekrety = nothing '-------------------
'PASS 5 - Query 3: wylicz 'w okresie' #ifdef _SECURITY strWhere = "(eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY or eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_BZ_OSTAT) and eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and dDataKsieg between " +_ #else strWhere = "eTyp=N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY and eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE and dDataKsieg between " +_ #endif doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDateStart) + " and " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDateEnd) if strSkrot = "" then strWhere = build_zois_where(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe) else strWhere = build_zois_where_ex(strWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, strSkrot) end if
set pCursDekrety = trans_.createadors(_ "select pKonto,sum(curWn),sum(curMa) from n5dekret_sums as t_ds join n5konto as t_konto " +_ "on t_ds.pKonto=t_konto.idobj where " + strWhere + " group by t_ds.pKonto") do while not pCursDekrety.EOF pKIM.put_ObrO pCursDekrety(0),pCursDekrety(1),pCursDekrety(2) pCursDekrety.movenext loop set pCursDekrety = nothing '-------------------
'PASS 6 - wylicz obroty okres set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5konto where eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE") do while not pCursKonta.EOF pKIM.calc_Obr pCursKonta(0) pCursKonta.movenext loop '-------------------
'PASS 7 - wylicz obroty nar i salda set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5konto where eAnalit=N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE") do while not pCursKonta.EOF pKIM.calc_SO pCursKonta(0) pCursKonta.movenext loop '-------------------
'PASS 8 'todo: configure according pParChoiceColums pKIM.calc_SaS true, true, true '-------------------
set prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex_2 = pKIM end function '------------------------------------------------ ' funkcja pomocnicza dla ZOiS '------------------------------------------------ function build_zois_where_ex(strInputWhere, byref pParChoiceStatus, byval strFiltrSymbolu, byval idKwalifikator , bFiltrBilansowe, byval strSkrot)
if idKwalifikator <> -1 then strInputWhere = strInputWhere + " and pKwalifikator=" + cstr(idKwalifikator) end if
if not pParChoiceStatus is nothing then strInputWhere = strInputWhere + " and " + cstr(pParChoiceStatus.get_where_part(trans_)) end if
if strFiltrSymbolu <> "" then strInputWhere = strInputWhere + " and " + strFiltrSymbolu end if
if bFiltrBilansowe then strInputWhere = strInputWhere + " and t_konto.eBilans = N5KONTO_BILANSOWE " end if
if strSkrot <> "" then 'pobierz IdObj jednostki dim nIdJedn: nIdJedn = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,"strSkrot='" + strSkrot + "'") if nIdJedn > 0 then strInputWhere = strInputWhere + " and t_konto.pJednostka = " + CStr(nIdJedn) end if end if
build_zois_where_ex = strInputWhere end function
function build_zois_where(strInputWhere, byref pParChoiceStatus, byval strFiltrSymbolu, byval idKwalifikator , bFiltrBilansowe) build_zois_where = build_zois_where_ex(strInputWhere, pParChoiceStatus, strFiltrSymbolu, idKwalifikator, bFiltrBilansowe, "") end function
'funkcja generuje BO z BZ podanego roku księgowego (pPopRokKsieg) 'i umieszcza jako dowody księgowe we wskazanym rejestrze BO '(pDestRejBO) 'funkcja nie zapisuje tego
function generate_bo_from_bz_param(byref pPopRokKsieg, byref pDestRejBO, byval strPodzialNaTrans, byval strPomin) dim idRejBO : idRejBO = pDestRejBO.idobj dim dDataRozpRK : dDataRozpRK = pPopRokKsieg.dDataRozp dim dDataZakonRK : dDataZakonRK = pPopRokKsieg.dDataZakon
'remove all old records from pDestRejBO dim pCursOldBO : set pCursOldBO = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,"pRejestrDok=" + cstr(idRejBO) , "" , "") dim pDK for each pDK in pCursOldBO pDK.markdel = true next
'reset counters pDestRejBO.nLicznik = pDestRejBO.n5rejestrdok_get_licznik_for_db(clng(1)) trans_.save
'-- compose conditions dim strCond1 : strCond1 = split2cond(strPodzialNaTrans) dim strCond2 : strCond2 = split2cond(strPomin)
'prepare query dim strSQL1 : strSQL1 = _ "select dek.pKonto,dek.pTransakcja,dek.pKwalifikator," dim strSQL2 : strSQL2 = _ "select dek.pKonto,0,0," dim strSQL3 : strSQL3 = "sum(curWn),sum(curMa),max(k.strSymbol) from n5dekret as dek inner join n5konto as k on dek.pKonto = k.idobj " +_ "where dek.dDataksieg between " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataRozpRK) +_ " and " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataZakonRK) strSQL1 = strSQL1 + strSQL3 + " and " + strCond1 + " and not " + strCond2 strSQL2 = strSQL2 + strSQL3 + " and not " + strCond1 + " and not " + strCond2 strSQL1 = strSQL1 + " group by dek.pKonto" + ",dek.pTransakcja,dek.pKwalifikator having sum(curWn) <> sum(curMa) " strSQL2 = strSQL2 + " group by dek.pKonto having sum(curWn) <> sum(curMa) "
dim strSQL : strSQL = strSQL1 + " union all " + strSQL2 + " order by max(k.strSymbol) "
'fill new DK
trans_.var(APPVAR_DZIENNIK_DK) = idRejBO set pDK = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG) dim pCursSalda : set pCursSalda = trans_.createadors(strSQL)
do while not pCursSalda.EOF dim pDekret set pDekret = pDK.listDekret.addnew() with pDekret set .pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,clng(pCursSalda(0)))
dim idTrans : idTrans = clng(pCursSalda(1)) if idTrans <> 0 then set .pTransakcja = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,idTrans) else set .pTransakcja = nothing end if
dim idKwal : idKwal = clng(pCursSalda(2)) if idKwal <> 0 then set .pKwalifikator = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KWALIFIKATOR,idKwal) else set .pKwalifikator = nothing end if dim curWn : curWn = ccur(pCursSalda(3)) dim curMa : curMa = ccur(pCursSalda(4)) if curWn > curMa then .curWn = curWn - curMa .curMa = ccur(0.0) else .curWn = ccur(0.0) .curMa = curMa - curWn end if .strOpis = "" end with pCursSalda.movenext loop
end function
'zamien konta rozdzielone srednikiem na warunek function split2cond(strKonta) dim arrParts : arrParts = Split(strKonta,";")
dim strCond : strCond = "((0=1)" dim iter for iter = 0 to UBound(arrParts) if arrParts(iter) <> "" then strCond = strCond + " or k.strSymbol like '" + arrParts(iter) + "%'" end if next strCond = strCond + ")"
split2cond = strCond end function
'funkcja generuje BO bieżącego roku księgowego z BZ poprzedniego roku 'umieszcza w rejestr function generate_bo_from_bz(byval strPodzialNaTrans, byval strPomin) : generate_bo_from_bz = 0 dim pCurrRKS : set pCurrRKS = getCurrentRKS() if pCurrRKS is nothing then generate_bo_from_bz = -1 exit function end if dim pCursRK : set pCursRK = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG,"dDataZakon <" +_ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pCurrRKS.dDataRozp) , "dDataZakon desc" , "") if not pCursRK.exists(1) then generate_bo_from_bz = -2 exit function end if
dim idRejBO : idRejBO = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,_ "eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BO and pRokKsieg=" + cstr(pCurrRKS.idobj)) if idRejBO <= 0 then generate_bo_from_bz = -3 exit function end if
dim pDestRejBO : set pDestRejBO = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,idRejBO)
generate_bo_from_bz_param pCursRK.get(1),pDestRejBO, strPodzialNaTrans, strPomin end function
function get_current_rok_ksiegowy() set get_current_rok_ksiegowy = getCurrentRKS() end function
#ifdef _SECURITY function wczytaj_dane_trio()
dim strSQL
strSQL = "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name like 'konto_map') drop table konto_map" trans_.execsql strSQL strSQL = "create table konto_map (" + vbCrLf +_ "strSymbol varchar(64) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "id_baza1 int not null," + vbCrLf +_ "id_baza2 int not null," + vbCrLf +_ "zrodlo int not null, " + vbCrLf +_ "nowy int not null )"
trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "insert into konto_map select strSymbol,idobj,idobj,0,0 from navo2002..n5konto"+ vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "insert into konto_map select strSymbol,0,idobj,1,1 from navo2002bis..n5konto"+ vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " update konto_map set nowy=0, id_baza1= " + vbCrLf +_ " (select id_baza1 from konto_map as k_m where konto_map.strsymbol=k_m.strsymbol and id_baza1<>0) " + vbCrLf +_ " where id_baza1=0 and id_baza2 in (select k_m2.id_baza2 from konto_map as k_m1 " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join konto_map as k_m2 on k_m1.strsymbol=k_m2.strsymbol " + vbCrLf +_ " where k_m1.id_baza1 <> k_m2.id_baza1 and k_m2.id_baza1=0) " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "delete from n5dekret_sums " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "delete from n5dekret" trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "delete from n5konto " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " insert into n5konto select k.idobj,k.versionid,k.strSymbol,k.strNazwa,k.strOpis,k.pJednostka,0,0, " + vbCrLf +_ " k.pKontoNadrz,k.eAnalit,k.eBilans,k.eAktywne,k.nSubLen " + vbCrLf +_ " from navo2002..n5konto k " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='kopiowanie_kont') " + vbCrLf +_ " drop procedure kopiowanie_kont" trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "create procedure kopiowanie_kont " + vbCrLf +_ " as " + vbCrLf +_ " declare " + vbCrLf +_ " @nNumKonto integer, " + vbCrLf +_ " @strSymbol varchar(64), " + vbCrLf +_ " @strNazwa varchar(128), " + vbCrLf +_ " @strOpis varchar(1024), " + vbCrLf +_ " @pJednostka integer , " + vbCrLf +_ " @wrefPodmiotRozrach integer, " + vbCrLf +_ " @wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt integer , " + vbCrLf +_ " @pKontoNadrz integer , " + vbCrLf +_ " @eAnalit integer , " + vbCrLf +_ " @eBilans integer , " + vbCrLf +_ " @eAktywne integer, " + vbCrLf +_ " @nSubLen integer " + vbCrLf +_ " declare konto_cursor cursor for " + vbCrLf +_ " select k.strSymbol,k.strNazwa,k.strOpis,k.pJednostka,0,0, " + vbCrLf +_ " k.pKontoNadrz,k.eAnalit,k.eBilans,k.eAktywne,k.nSubLen " + vbCrLf +_ " from navo2002bis..n5konto k where (k.strsymbol collate Polish_CI_AS) in " + vbCrLf +_ " (select strsymbol from konto_map where id_baza1=0) " + vbCrLf +_ " select @nNumKonto=isnull(max(idobj)+1,1) from n5konto " + vbCrLf +_ " open konto_cursor " + vbCrLf +_ " fetch next from konto_cursor into @strSymbol,@strNazwa,@strOpis,@pJednostka,@wrefPodmiotRozrach,@wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt,@pKontoNadrz,@eAnalit, " + vbCrLf +_ " @eBilans,@eAktywne,@nSubLen " + vbCrLf +_ " while @@fetch_status = 0 " + vbCrLf +_ " begin " + vbCrLf +_ " insert into n5konto select @nnumKonto,1,@strSymbol,@strNazwa,@strOpis,@pJednostka,@wrefPodmiotRozrach,@wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt,@pKontoNadrz,@eAnalit, " + vbCrLf +_ " @eBilans,@eAktywne,@nSubLen " + vbCrLf +_ " update konto_map set id_baza1 = @nnumKonto where strsymbol like @strSymbol " + vbCrLf +_ " set @nNumKonto= @nNumKonto+1 " + vbCrLf +_ " fetch next from konto_cursor into @strSymbol,@strNazwa,@strOpis,@pJednostka,@wrefPodmiotRozrach,@wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt,@pKontoNadrz,@eAnalit, " + vbCrLf +_ " @eBilans,@eAktywne,@nSubLen " + vbCrLf +_ " end " + vbCrLf +_ " close konto_cursor " + vbCrLf +_ " deallocate konto_cursor " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "kopiowanie_kont" trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " update n5konto set pkontonadrz = (select id_baza1 from konto_map as k_m where " + vbCrLf +_ " n5konto.pkontonadrz = k_m.id_baza2 and k_m.zrodlo=1 ) " + vbCrLf +_ " where idobj in (select id_baza1 from konto_map where nowy=1) and " + vbCrLf +_ " pkontonadrz <> 0 " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " insert into n5dekret " + vbCrLf +_ " select d.idobj,d.versionid," + vbCrLf +_ " d.pKonto,d.curWn,d.curMa,d.dDataKsieg,d.strOpis,d.eTyp,d.eStatus,d.pTransakcja,d.pKwalifikator,d.cAuto " + vbCrLf +_ " from navo2002..n5dekret d " trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = " if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='kopiowanie_dekretow')" + vbCrLf +_ " drop procedure kopiowanie_dekretow" trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "create procedure kopiowanie_dekretow " + vbCrLf +_ " as" + vbCrLf +_ " declare " + vbCrLf +_ " @nNumOper integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @pKonto integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @curWn decimal(12,2)," + vbCrLf +_ " @curMa decimal(12,2)," + vbCrLf +_ " @dDataKsieg datetime," + vbCrLf +_ " @strOpis varchar(128)," + vbCrLf +_ " @eTyp integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @eStatus integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @pTransakcja integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @pKwalifikator integer," + vbCrLf +_ " @cAuto varchar(1)" + vbCrLf +_ " declare dekret_cursor cursor for" + vbCrLf +_ " select km.id_baza1, d2.curWn,d2.curMa,d2.dDataKsieg,d2.strOpis,d2.eTyp,d2.eStatus,d2.pTransakcja,d2.pKwalifikator,d2.cAuto" + vbCrLf +_ " from navo2002bis..n5dekret d2 " + vbCrLf +_ " join konto_map km on d2.pkonto = km.id_baza2 " + vbCrLf +_ " where km.zrodlo=1" + vbCrLf +_ " select @nnumoper=isnull(max(idobj)+1,1) from n5dekret" + vbCrLf +_ " open dekret_cursor" + vbCrLf +_ " fetch next from dekret_cursor into @pKonto,@curWn, @curMa, @dDataKsieg,@strOpis,@eTyp ,@eStatus ," + vbCrLf +_ " @pTransakcja,@pKwalifikator,@cAuto" + vbCrLf +_ " while @@fetch_status = 0 " + vbCrLf +_ " begin" + vbCrLf +_ " insert into n5dekret select @nnumoper,1, @pKonto,@curWn, @curMa, @dDataKsieg,@strOpis,@eTyp ,@eStatus ," + vbCrLf +_ " @pTransakcja,@pKwalifikator,@cAuto" + vbCrLf +_ " print 'wykonywanie procedury kopiowanie_dekretow'+(str(@nnumoper))" + vbCrLf +_ " set @nnumoper=@nnumoper+1" + vbCrLf +_ " fetch next from dekret_cursor into @pKonto,@curWn, @curMa, @dDataKsieg,@strOpis,@eTyp,@eStatus ," + vbCrLf +_ " @pTransakcja,@pKwalifikator,@cAuto" + vbCrLf +_ " end" + vbCrLf +_ " close dekret_cursor" + vbCrLf +_ " deallocate dekret_cursor" trans_.execsql strSQL
strSQL = "kopiowanie_dekretow" trans_.execsql strSQL
wczytaj_dane_trio = true
end function #endif
